gical works. Usually the number of children to be
born is guessed by the number of Navamsas gained by the
5th house or 5th lord. If the 5th lord is aspected by Jupiter
or Venus, the number is doubled. Malefics occupying the
intervening Navamsas denote possible losses.
In Chart No. 105, the 5th house is unafflicted as no
benefic or malefic occupies or aspects it. From Chandra
Lagna, however, both Mars and Jupiter aspect the 5th
house. The 5th lord Venus is with the Sun and Mercury,
while Jupiter Putrakaraka, having caused Gajakesari, is
aspected by Mars. Rahu and Ketu have nothing to do with
the 5th house. Consequently the 5th house is fairly well
disposed. The 5th lord Venus has gained by 5

The Fifth House 241
Chart No. 105.—Born on 6-1-1906 at 5-24 p.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lat. 30° N., Long. 78° E.)
Balance of Sun Dasa at birth : Years 1-7-21.
Navamsa indicating 5 issues. In the Navamsa he is aspected
by the Moon and Jupiter. Hence doubling the number, we
have 10.
